values.value: SELECT External_UUID__c, Lead__r.Numero_de_Conta_na_lead__c, Lead__r.ProjectId__c, Status, SchedStartTime FROM ServiceAppointment

mdmId:Lead__r.Numero_de_Conta_na_lead__c; appointmentId:External_UUID__c; projectId:Lead__r.ProjectId__c; status:Status; date:SchedStartTime; appointmentSystem:"SALESFORCE"; createdBy:Lead__r.Numero_de_Conta_na_lead__c; bu:"003"
WHERE SchedStartTime != NULL AND Lead__r.Numero_de_Conta_na_lead__c != NULL AND Lead__r.ProjectId__c != NULL AND Lead__r.LeadSource = 'L2S'
